name: Vanilla Dream
description: Classic creamy vanilla ice cream made with fresh ingredients.

name: Chocolate Bliss
description: Classic creamy vanilla ice cream but instead of vanilla, it's chocolate.

name: Strawberry Delight
description: Taste the fresh strawberries melting on your tongue!

name: Minty Toothpaste
description: Leaves your breath fresh and clean with our special spearmint cream.

name: Radioactive Sludge
description: A lime flavoured ice cream that never seems to go bad!.

name: Tiger Prowl
description: Orange and black licorice ice cream that makes you hunt like a tiger

name: Unicorn
description: Beware! Might give you magical abilities!

name: Mac and Cream
description: A cheesy twist on savoury ice cream!

name: Stop Light
description: A normal Vanilla Dream but dyed red just for fun!

name: Prickly Pear
description: A wonderful pear flavour that gets better (and more painful) the more you chew!

name: Chili Ice Cream
description: Beat the heat with something sweet!
